content.rendered:
This page contains all the Uusi kielemme articles I’ve written regarding the creation of new words. There are three common ways to create new words in Finnish: derivation, compounding and borrowing. Derivation is the process of creating new words from existing words with the help of suffixes or prefixes. Compounding means combining two words to make a new compound word. Finnish loanwords are typically borrowed from Russian, Swedish or English.

Confusing words

DERIVATES & COMPOUND WORDS & LOANWORDS

Nouns and adjectives ending in…

    • Suomalainen, irakilainen: –lAinen
    • Avanto, luonto: –ntO
    • Kysyntä, uusinta: –ntA
    • Kirjasto, väestö: –stO
    • Sattuma, esitelmä: –mA
    • Myyjä, opiskelija: –jA
    • Aavikko, kolikko: -kkO
    • Hylätty, tunnettu: -ttU
    • Myymälä, neuvola: -lA
    • Jälkkäri, makkari: –Ari
    • Nouns ending in -nen
    • Common adjectives: -nen
    • Loanwords ending in -nen
    • Words ending in -inen
    • Words ending in -llinen
    • Words ending in -mAinen
    • Kallis, kaunis: –is
    • Roskis, futis: –is
    • Hammas, sairas: –As
    • Ostos, päätös: -Os
    • Opetus, ymmärrys: –Us
    • Vanhuus, terveys: –UUs
    • Kysymys, hakemus: –mUs
    • Työtön, avuton: –tOn
    • Ystävätär, laulajatar: –tAr
    • Soitin, keitin: –in
    • Hame, nalle: -e
    • Väsynyt, uupunut: –nUt
    • Kyynel, manner: -l, -n, -r
  • Overview of derivation-related articles

Adverbs ending in…

    • Adverbs ending in -sti
    • Adverbs ending in –ttain
    • Adverbs ending in -kkain
    • Adverbs ending in -isin

Verb derivation

    • Translative verbs
    • Transitivity overview
    • Automative verbs -UA (kaatua)
    • Automative verbs -UTUA (uusiutua)
    • Reflexive verbs – UtUA (peseytyä)
    • Causative verbs (lopettaa)
    • Emotive causative verbs (surettaa)
    • Curative verbs (teettää)
    • Verbs ending in -OITTAA
    • Compound verbs

Words beginning in –epä

Word families

  • Liike liikkua liikenne

Compounding

  • Finnish compound words
  • Compound adjectives
  • Typical compound adjectives list
  • Reversible compound words
  • Animal compound words
  • Compound verbs

Loaning

  • Swedish loanverbs -ATA
  • English loanverbs -ATA
  • Baltic and Germanic loanwords
